hero.title: Find Racket Sport Courts Near You
hero.subtitle: The easiest way to find and book padel, pickleball, tennis, squash, and badminton courts in Dubai and across the UAE.

features.title: Everything You Need to Play More

map.title: Interactive Map
map.desc: Find courts and clubs near you with location-based search powered by real geographic data.

community.desc: Post a request or browse listings to find training partners, hitting partners, and doubles teams.

events.desc: Discover tournaments, open days, and social sessions at facilities near you.

stripe_connect.ready_body: Your courts are bookable. Players can pay directly and payouts go to your bank account.
stripe_connect.verifying_body: You've submitted everything Stripe needs. They're now verifying your details.
stripe_connect.verifying_hint: Stripe verification typically completes in a few hours, sometimes up to 1–2 business days. Your courts will be bookable as soon as it's done — no action needed from you.
stripe_connect.needs_action_body: Stripe is waiting on the following from you before charges can be enabled. Click below to continue verification — you'll upload these directly in Stripe's hosted form.
stripe_connect.incomplete_body: Stripe still needs a bit more from you before payouts can land.
stripe_connect.checklist_details: Submit the remaining business / identity details.
stripe_connect.checklist_charges: Confirm your bank account so charges can be enabled.
stripe_connect.split_disclosure: On every booking, Stripe transfers {owner}% to your connected account and Saha keeps a {platform}% platform fee. Payouts go directly to the bank account on file in Stripe — Saha never holds your money.
stripe_connect.disconnect_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
stripe_connect.connect_failed: Could not start Stripe onboarding. Please try again.
stripe_connect.hosted_hint: You'll be taken to Stripe to enter your business and bank details. Takes about 3 minutes.

wallet.hint_can_apply: Apply at checkout to save on your next booking.
wallet.hint_earn: Complete 10 bookings to earn your first credit.
wallet.hero_hint_balance: Tap Apply at checkout to use your credit.
wallet.hero_hint_zero: Every 10 completed bookings earns you a credit toward a free hour.
wallet.progress_text: {current} of {target} completed bookings since your last reward.
wallet.how_it_works_body: Every 10 completed bookings, we credit your wallet with the average value of those bookings (capped at AED 50). At checkout, redeem up to 10% of the booking total — the rest is paid via Stripe.
wallet.no_interest_note: Wallet balance is a prepaid credit — no interest accrues. See our Shariah Compliance page.

community_guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
community_guidelines.intro: Saha is a UAE-first racket sports community. These guidelines keep it respectful, family-friendly, and focused on play.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions. Can't find what you need? Email us — we read every message.
help.no_results: No results. Try a different search or scroll the categories below.
help.contact_body: We typically reply within one business day.

how_to_book.q: How do I book a court?
how_to_book.a: Open the map, tap a facility, pick a court and an available time slot, then complete payment on Stripe Checkout. You'll see a confirmation page with a QR code right after.

without_account.q: Can I book without an account?
without_account.a: No. You need a free Saha account so we can send you the confirmation, the QR code at the venue, and a reminder before your game.

facility_cancels.q: What if the facility cancels my booking?
facility_cancels.a: You receive a full refund automatically to the card you paid with. We email and WhatsApp you the moment it happens.

move_booking.q: Can I move my booking to a different time?
move_booking.a: Yes — once, if both the old and new slots are free and you're more than 24 hours before the original start time. Open the booking and tap Move.

recurring.a: Pick a slot and the number of weeks (1, 2, 4, 8, or 12). We charge a single combined amount upfront and lock every week at once. You can cancel a single occurrence or the whole series later.

methods.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
methods.a: Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Google Pay — all via Stripe. Local wallet support (Careem Pay, stcpay, etc.) is on our roadmap.

when_charged.a: Immediately at booking. We hold the slot for you and pay the facility after your game.

refund_timing.a: Once approved, your bank typically posts the refund within 5–10 business days. The Saha side is instant — the wait is on the card network.

platform_fee.a: We add a 10% service fee on top of the court price. This pays for the platform, payment processing, and support. It's a service charge, not interest — see our Shariah Compliance page.

card_storage.q: Do you store my card details?
card_storage.a: No. Card details are handled entirely by Stripe — we never see or store them on our servers.

change_phone.q: How do I change my phone number?
change_phone.a: Go to Account → Settings, enter the new number, and confirm the WhatsApp code we send. The old number stops receiving notifications immediately.

delete_account.a: Yes. Email hello@saha.ae from your registered address. We delete your profile, bookings history, and personal data within 30 days as required by UAE PDPL.

phone_verification.q: Why do I need to verify my phone via WhatsApp?
phone_verification.a: Booking confirmations and reminders go to your phone via WhatsApp. Verification stops someone else from using your number and receiving your bookings.

qr_code.q: What's the QR code on my booking for?
qr_code.a: Show it at the facility reception so the staff can check you in. It's tied to your booking and works without internet.

how_to_list.q: How do I list my facility on Saha?
how_to_list.a: Create a business account, fill in your facility details (name, address, sports, hours, photos), add at least one court, and connect Stripe to receive payouts. We review and approve within 1–2 business days.

stripe_connect.q: Why do I need a Stripe account?
stripe_connect.a: Stripe handles the payment from the player to you, less our 10% service fee. We never hold your money — it goes directly to your Stripe balance and then to your bank.

payouts.a: Stripe pays you on its standard schedule (usually 2–7 days for UAE accounts). You can change the schedule from your Stripe dashboard.

disable_court.q: Can I temporarily disable a court?
disable_court.a: Yes. Open Dashboard → Courts and toggle the court inactive. Existing bookings stay valid; new bookings are blocked until you re-enable it.

window.a: Cancel at least 24 hours before your slot for a full refund. Within the last 24 hours, the booking is non-refundable — the slot is released for other players but we don't refund the amount.

no_show.a: If you don't check in at the facility on the booking day, the booking is marked no-show the next day. Repeated no-shows affect your reliability score, which facilities can see.

recurring_partial.q: Can I cancel one week of a recurring booking?
recurring_partial.a: Yes. Open the booking and tap Cancel — only that week is cancelled, the rest of the series stays. Or use Cancel Series to cancel every remaining week at once (refund is pro-rata for weeks more than 24 hours away).

facility_cancel_refund.a: Full automatic refund to your original payment method. No action needed from you.

data_use.q: How do you use my data?
data_use.a: We use your details to manage your bookings, notify you about them, and improve the platform. We don't sell your data. Full details are in our Privacy Policy.

cookies.a: Strictly necessary cookies (auth session, facility switcher) — always set. Functional cookies (welcome-back, recently-viewed, abandoned booking) — only after you accept on the cookie banner. See our Cookie Strategy doc.

data_export.a: Yes. Email hello@saha.ae and we'll send a JSON export of your profile and booking history within 30 days as required by UAE PDPL.
